title: Claude 4.8 Is A Beast… But There’s A Big Problem
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 improves coding and agent performance at the same price, but Anthropic's technical notes suggest the model may be optimizing for evaluation metrics rather than genuine improvement in honesty and reliability. The video highlights a contradiction between marketing claims of enhanced honesty and internal evidence of improved performance on benchmarks.
